NAME: Nox
TEXT: Well... It's nice to meet ya! I don't, I can't, who are...

NAME: Nox
TEXT: Sorry about that! Here, let me give you the crash course the old man taught me.

NAME: Nox
TEXT: Uh, to transform, press [img=105x118]res://ASSETS/Controller interface/Controller-DPAD-DOWN.png[/img] to turn into me and [img=105x118]res://ASSETS/Controller interface/Controller-DPAD-LEFT.png[/img] [img=105x118]res://ASSETS/Controller interface/Controller-DPAD-RIGHT.png[/img] for the next transformation you find! And [img=105x118]res://ASSETS/Controller interface/Controller-DPAD-UP.png[/img] brings you back to normal.

NAME: Nox
TEXT: And, if you hit a wall while falling, lean into it [img=105x118]res://ASSETS/Controller interface/Controller-Joystick-static.png[/img] to slow yourself down, jump again to kick off.

NAME: Nox
TEXT: Wow, that was long, guess the old man rubbed off on me!

NAME: Nox
TEXT: Oh, and if you don't want to listen to people, feel free to press [img=105x118]res://ASSETS/Controller interface/Controller-BButton.png.png[/img] to skip!

NAME: Nox
TEXT: Anyways, if you're looking for answers, you should check in with Assistant.

NAME: Nox
TEXT: He's part of the guild's way of keeping contact, even in the most remote places.

NAME: Nox
TEXT: There should be robots like him scattered all over the world.

NAME: Nox
TEXT: If anyone still knows what's going on, it'll be them.
